description: Connects Jellyfin to any Xtream Codes IPTV provider. Surfaces live channels with EPG guide, VOD movies, and series as native Jellyfin content. Supports catch-up TV for compatible channels.
name: Flux - Xtream Codes Client
overview: Xtream Codes IPTV client plugin for Jellyfin — live TV, EPG, VOD, and series.

versions.changelog: Fix: restore IRequiresMediaInfoCallback on VodChannel (movies broken in v1.1.9); fix SeriesChannel episode ID to use only alphanumeric separators and a fast O(1) GetChannelItemMediaInfo.
Fix: remove IRequiresMediaInfoCallback; embed stream URLs directly in ChannelItemInfo.MediaSources at item-list time so Jellyfin never needs a callback for series/VOD playback.
Fix: GetChannelItemMediaInfo handles both old and new episode ID formats; metadata fetch wrapped in try-catch so exceptions never block playback.
Fix: dynamic DataVersion on VOD/Series channels forces Jellyfin to re-fetch after sync; series episode ID now encodes seriesId+container to avoid O(N) HTTP lookup on playback.
Fix: use native fetch() with explicit auth token for sync trigger; return JSON body from sync endpoint to avoid empty-response parse errors.
Fix: manual sync buttons now call /Flux/Sync/{type} directly (bypasses task ID lookup); health panel reads live HealthMonitor data via /Flux/Health.
Fix: AnyToStringConverter handles fields that arrive as numbers from some providers (port, max_connections, exp_date, rating, etc.).
Fix: remove [Required] on TestConnection query params — [ApiController] automatic validation was returning HTTP 400 before the handler ran.
Fix: use AllowAnonymous on TestConnection endpoint and switch to ApiClient.getJSON to avoid auth/network errors.
Fix: proxy Test Connection through Jellyfin backend to avoid browser CORS errors when reaching IPTV providers.
Fix: implement IPluginServiceRegistrator so Jellyfin correctly registers services and shows the Settings page. Add data-pluginuniqueid to config page.
Initial release: live channels with EPG, VOD movies, series with season/episode browsing, catch-up TV, multi-provider support, health monitoring, encrypted credentials, admin config page.
